'''tanata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:izafet|izafet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:izafet|izafet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tanata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tænætæth|tænætæth]] || [[word:tænætæj|tænætæj]] || [[word:tænætæsh|tænætæsh]] || [[word:tænætæ|tænætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tananatath|tananatath]] || [[word:tananataj|tananataj]] || [[word:tananatash|tananatash]] || [[word:tananata|tananata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tanatath|tanatath]] || [[word:tanataj|tanataj]] || [[word:tanatash|tanatash]] || [[word:tanata|tanata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tanaftath|tanaftath]] || [[word:tanaftaj|tanaftaj]] || [[word:tanaftash|tanaftash]] || [[word:tanaftaf|tanaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tanatatha|tanatatha]] || [[word:tanataja|tanataja]] || [[word:tanatasha|tanatasha]] || [[word:tanataka|tanataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tanatath|tanatath]] || [[word:tanataj|tanataj]] || [[word:tanatash|tanatash]] || [[word:tanata|tanata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tanatathal|tanatathal]] || [[word:tanatajal|tanatajal]] || [[word:tanatashal|tanatashal]] || [[word:tanatakal|tanatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tanatathatha|tanatathatha]] || [[word:tanatajaja|tanatajaja]] || [[word:tanatashasha|tanatashasha]] || [[word:tanataka|tanataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tanatathan|tanatathan]] || [[word:tanatajan|tanatajan]] || [[word:tanatashan|tanatashan]] || [[word:tanatakan|tanatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tanatathaoro|tanatathaoro]] || [[word:tanatajaoro|tanatajaoro]] || [[word:tanatashaoro|tanatashaoro]] || [[word:tanatakaoro|tanatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
